title: borreria suffruticosa
intro: Borreria suffruticosa, also known as the African teabush or thorny false buttonweed, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. It has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, as well as showing potential in reducing the severity of malaria. Borreria suffruticosa can be prepared as a tea or infused in water to be consumed, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
